CustomField.label: Attainment Source
CustomField.description: How attainment (achieved amount) is calculated. Quota Record: reads from Quota__c.Achieved_Amount__c (maintained by Incentives module). Live from Forecast: computes from Closed Won category overrides in the current period. Hybrid: uses Quota if available, falls back to live calculation.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Quota Record: uses Incentives module quota tracking. Live from Forecast: computes from Closed Won deals. Hybrid: Quota if available, otherwise live.
